prompt: Research the current state of quantum computing and write a comprehensive report covering major companies, breakthroughs, and applications.
Research the top 5 programming languages in 2026 and compare their popularity, use cases, and job market demand.
Research renewable energy trends globally and write a report on solar, wind, and battery storage developments.
Research the impact of AI on healthcare covering diagnostics, drug discovery, and ethical considerations.
Research the current state of electric vehicles and write a report on Tesla, BYD, and other major manufacturers.
Compare the top 3 cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) in terms of AI/ML services, pricing, and developer experience.
Compare Python, JavaScript, and Rust for backend web development including performance, ecosystem, and learning curve.
Analyze and compare the top 3 LLM providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google DeepMind in terms of model capabilities and pricing.
Compare React, Vue, and Angular for frontend development covering performance, community, and enterprise adoption.
Research sorting algorithms, write a Python script comparing bubble sort, merge sort, and quick sort performance, and compile a report.
Research machine learning frameworks, write a Python script that creates a simple classification model, and summarize findings.
Research data visualization libraries in Python, write a script that generates sample charts, and compile best practices.
Research both blockchain technology and cybersecurity trends, then write a combined analysis of how they intersect.
Research space exploration advances by NASA and SpaceX, then analyze the commercial space industry outlook.
Research the gig economy and remote work trends post-2024, covering platforms, worker rights, and future predictions.
